original_image_tags: A typewritten document on aged paper, slightly yellowed. Punch holes are visible on the left margin. Handwritten numbers "U-39942" and possibly "Z-446" appear in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed document page with headers, body text, and footer. Includes 'SECRET' markings at top and bottom. References a drawing 'Loading Flying Disc' and a report on Horten tailless aircraft. No embedded photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present on this page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, but Description A mentions handwritten numbers in the corner that Description B does not address.
